overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a foggy industrial harbor dock. The character moves from covered walkways through open cargo areas with wooden carts, past brick warehouses, and along the waterfront with steamships visible in the mist.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open dock cargo area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered wooden walkway beside warehouse buildings

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and suspenders standing against warehouse wall
worker in blue shirt walking past the character

wooden roof structure providing shelter over the walkway
thick vertical wooden posts supporting the roof
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walking surface
wooden railing along the water edge of the dock
metal lantern suspended from roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow covered wooden walkway beside a warehouse wall, with wooden support posts and a roof overhead. The foggy harbor is visible through the railing on the left. The character passes several NPCs before emerging into the open dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cargo dock with scattered carts and crates

events.description: character weaves between wooden cargo carts and crates
approaches covered passage entrance between warehouses

agents.ego_description: navigating through open dock area with cargo carts and shipping crates

notable_agents.action: worker leaning against stacked wooden crates
man standing at dock railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: large wooden transport carts with red-painted wheels
piles of wooden shipping crates and cargo boxes
wooden barrels stacked near the dock edge
tall wooden posts with hanging lanterns
large industrial building visible through the morning fog

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide open dock area filled with wooden cargo carts, crates, and barrels scattered across the plank surface. The foggy sky is partially visible overhead. Workers are seen standing and walking among the cargo as the character navigates toward a covered passage.

events.description: enters darker covered passage with reduced visibility
exits covered passage into brick building courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow covered passage between wooden structures

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden crate near wall with warning sign

entered.detail: narrow covered walkway between two warehouse buildings
rusted corrugated metal roofing over the passage
vertical wooden plank walls forming passage sides
painted text on wall reading KEEP OUT UNLESS AUTHORIZED

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, enclosed passage between warehouse buildings with corrugated metal roofing overhead. The lighting drops significantly. A man sits near a painted warning sign on the wall as the character passes through to the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick warehouse loading area with green doors

agents.ego_description: walking past large brick warehouse building with signage

notable_agents.action: worker carrying wooden crate near building entrance
man carrying metal bucket walking toward the character

entered.detail: large multi-story brick industrial building with LARNED & CO signage
large green painted wooden warehouse doors
empty wooden carts near building entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the character enters a more industrial area dominated by a large brick warehouse with green doors and visible signage. Workers are carrying cargo and buckets around the loading area as the character continues toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock edge with moored steamships

events.description: turns toward waterfront edge revealing docked steamships

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront edge observing the foggy harbor and ships

notable_agents.action: worker crouching at dock edge near the water

entered.detail: large steam-powered ship with tall smokestacks moored at the dock
calm water surface of the harbor shrouded in fog
wooden bollards and posts for securing ships to the dock

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfront edge where large steamships are moored in the foggy harbor. The sun creates a backlit glow through the mist. A worker crouches at the water's edge as the character walks along the dock with the ships towering alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, sheltered walkway into a sprawling, open-air industrial dock. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden path beside a warehouse wall, where the foggy harbor is glimpsed through a railing under a low roof. As the character passes several NPCs, the scene opens up and expands into a wide cargo area. The camera then navigates through a dense arrangement of wooden carts, crates, and barrels scattered across the plank surface while workers move through the mist. Finally, the movement continues across the open dock under a hazy sky before turning toward a covered passage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed industrial corridor out into a bright, mist-shrouded harbor. It begins in a dark passage between warehouse buildings under corrugated metal roofing, passing a man seated by a painted warning sign. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bustling loading area dominated by a large brick warehouse with green doors where workers carry cargo and buckets. The camera then continues toward the waterfront, where the lighting shifts to a backlit glow as the mist clears to reveal towering steamships moored in the harbor. Finally, the movement follows the character along the dock's edge, passing a crouching worker with the massive ships looming through the fog.
